data.body:
BRAINSTORM — EXPERIMENT RESULTS (derisking spikes, all executed against real fixtures/servers).

E1 FRONT-MATTER WRITER (build-minimal over PyYAML) — ALL PASS. Canonical writer round-trips all 6 REAL reviewer files body-byte-for-byte; idempotent (wb(wb(x))==wb(x)); survives the 3 boundary corruptors (CRLF body, body-starts-with ---, no-trailing-newline + unicode); REJECTS unknown top-level keys; ACCEPTS sanctioned metadata: free-map; rejects BOM; canonical key order. => build-minimal decision derisked; no ruamel/python-frontmatter.

E2 SUBSUMPTION REPLACEMENT — ALL PASS. Proves: validate produced value against the CONSUMER's input_contract catches the missing-required-field wiring bug (validating vs producer's own schema passes = the trap); name-existence alone false-greens; 3-state shallow check flags ERROR on missing required, ABSTAINS UNKNOWN on oneOf, OK when shapes match. Draft202012Validator native. => no subsumption engine; shallow-static + runtime-against-consumer.

E3 MCP TRACK (real serena server via already-present mcp SDK) — ALL PASS. initialize handshake; paginated tools/list (21 tools); ALL advertise inputSchema (JSON Schema for palette); manifest cacheable; call_tool works; BOTH structuredContent and opaque content[] handled; isError surfaces gracefully; bad args don't crash client. FINDING: serena tools report outputSchema present yet a real call returned opaque content[] without structuredContent — so opaque-any fallback is needed EVEN WHEN outputSchema is declared (stronger than the research premise). => v1.1 MCP mechanics derisked; zero hand-rolled transport.

E4 EDITOR VALIDATION LATENCY — PASS. Using rebar's OWN registry-wired Draft202012Validator: build 1.12ms, validate p50 0.46ms / p99 0.52ms. Cross-file $ref (common.schema.json) resolves LOCALLY via referencing.Registry (no network). => debounced server round-trip is imperceptible; NO ajv. FINDING: rebar ALREADY wires referencing.Registry in schemas/__init__.py (registry()/validator()) — the research-recommended pattern — so our contract registry just EXTENDS existing infra (the naive bypass tried to fetch the github $id URL over the network and 404'd; the real code does not).

E5 DERIVED-INDEX LOCKFILE — ALL PASS. Deterministic generation; enforces exactly-one-default + no-dimension-collision (both rejections fire); CI drift gate detects a stale committed index (git diff --exit-code analog). => lockfile pattern derisked.

E8 MERGE MODEL — ALL PASS. Non-overlapping editor-edit + agent-hand-edit on canonical files merge cleanly keeping BOTH edits; overlapping same-line edit yields a normal LOCALIZED git conflict (1 hunk). => authored files merge as ordinary git 3-way text; canonical format IS the mitigation; no special merge driver (only the index is regenerated).

NET: zero new runtime dependencies confirmed across all spikes. Design mechanics validated end-to-end.
